arts.ttl: West Ham line up Julen Lopetegui replacement as ex-Real Madrid boss feels the heat
arts.sum: Julen Lopetegui is struggling at West Ham with the Hammers sat in the bottom half and the hierarchy at the London Stadium are having to consider managerial alternatives

arts.ttl: Ruud van Nistelrooy admits he was left 'HURT' and 'disappointed' by Man United axe, but new Leicester boss explains why he's 'grateful' to Ruben Amorim still
arts.sum: Van Nistelrooy, one of the finest forwards in United's history, had taken interim charge following the sacking of Ten Hag, but new boss Ruben Amorim decided he would not be part of his coaching plans.

arts.ttl: West Ham consider 3x league winner to replace Lopetegui after Arsenal drubbing - report
arts.sum: West Ham are considering hiring Sergio Conceicao to replace Julen Lopetegui after the drubbing against Arsenal, according to the Guardian. The news outlet reported on... The post West Ham consider 3x league winner to replace Lopetegui after Arsenal drubbing - report appeared first on West Ham Zone.

arts.ttl: Team News: Leicester City vs. West Ham United injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Tuesday's Premier League clash between Leicester City and West Ham United.

arts.ttl: West Ham may approach Sérgio Conceição to replace Julen Lopetegui
arts.sum: Portuguese left Porto after winning three titles Lopetegui under pressure after Arsenal rout West Ham are considering Sérgio Conceição as a replacement for Julen Lopetegui, whose future as manager is under growing pressure after his team’s 5-2 defeat at home against Arsenal last Saturday. The Guardian revealed last month that the Spaniard’s position hinged on results against Newcastle and Arsenal, with defeats in both outings likely to have resulted in his dismissal. Lopetegui, hired as David Moyes’s replacement last summer, met the challenge by recording an impressive 2-0 win at Newcastle. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Exclusive: West Ham and Crystal Palace 'Want to Hold Talks' to Sign McAtee
arts.sum: West Ham United and Crystal Palace are eager to open discussions over a January move for James McAtee

arts.ttl: Van Nistelrooy at work changing Leicester's 'style'
arts.sum: Newly-appointed manager Ruud van Nistelrooy is aiming to bring a sense of positivity to Leicester City and quickly make an impression on the Premier League club's players, as he looks to ensure that they remain in the English top flight.

arts.ttl: Ruud van Nistelrooy admits 'big issue' with Jamie Vardy over broken record
arts.sum: Ruud van Nistelrooy finds himself coaching Jamie Vardy at Leicester City - with the Foxes man previously beating his Premier League record for goals in consecutive games

arts.ttl: FA Cup third round draw LIVE: Updates as Liverpool, Manchester United and Premier League sides learn fate
arts.sum: A total of 64 sides will found out their opponents for the next round, with all Championship and Premier League sides entering the draw

arts.ttl: Ex Wales and Sunderland head coach Chris Coleman outlines ambitions with Leicester City sister club OH Leuven: ‘I do not see why we cannot compete for the top six in the long term’
